decision_commentary: All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (C), review_item (cost_basis), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (approve), comment (specific — acknowledges gap will be addressed at DG-09), timestamp (ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (dispatch_tomas), route_to (Tomás), sync_to_asana (false). Routing to Tomás for SOW is correct per production routing table. Comment notes the budget gap anticipation at DG-09 — shows appropriate awareness of the TC-006 scenario.
celia_routing_notes: All 11 fields present. route_to field used correctly. Comment shows forward awareness of budget alignment gate.
